# LaunchBridge

> LaunchBridge helps non-US founders form a US LLC, get an EIN, and open business banking — fully online, in English, French, or Arabic.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What LaunchBridge does and why founders choose it.
- [Services](/services): LLC formation, EIN, registered agent, banking setup.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and what's included.
- [Countries](/countries): Who we serve and country-specific guidance.
- [Academy](/academy): Guides on forming and running a US LLC from abroad.
- [About](/about): The team and mission behind LaunchBridge.
- [Contact](/contact): How to reach support and sales.

## Optional

- [Start your LLC](/start): Begin the formation flow.
- [Choose a method](/method): Pick a formation package.
